_meta.notes: All keys marked __TODO_TRANSLATE__ pending CODEOWNERS medical-terminology review. UI chrome (actions, navigation, errors) translated directly.

list.title: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:GDPR erasure requests
list.subtitle: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Article 17 of the GDPR. All actions on this page are audited.

wizard.title: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:New GDPR erasure request
wizard.irreversible_warning: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Erasure is irreversible. Once executed, the case and its derived artefacts cannot be recovered.
wizard.study_id_help: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Paste the UUID of the study to erase. The study must belong to your tenant.
wizard.justification_help: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Documented reason. Minimum 10 characters. Will appear on the confirmation PDF.
wizard.justification_placeholder: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:e.g., Data subject request received 2025-04-10 — Art. 17(1)(a) consent withdrawn.
wizard.mfa_body: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Confirm your identity. You will be prompted for a fresh multi-factor check before submission.
wizard.mfa_help: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:If step-up is required, a secure prompt will appear at submission time.
wizard.review_irreversible: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:After submission the case, its segmentations, lesions, reports, and deliveries will be permanently removed. Audit events are retained but residual identifiers are hashed.
wizard.confirm_phrase_help: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Type {{phrase}} (all caps) to unlock the Execute button.
wizard.executing_body: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Running the erasure pipeline. This usually finishes within 60 seconds.
wizard.step_up_required: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Fresh multi-factor authentication required. Please retry after re-authenticating.
wizard.timeout_body: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:The erasure did not complete within 90 seconds. Check the ops dashboard or retry.

confirmation.title: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Erasure completed
confirmation.body: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:The case and its derived artefacts have been erased. A confirmation PDF has been generated.
confirmation.tombstone_help: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:Cryptographic anchor linking this confirmation PDF to the audit log entry. Keep with your compliance records.
confirmation.pdf_pending: __TODO_TRANSLATE__:PDF render pending — refresh in a moment
